title: Simple Scene
description: A simple scene with basic SDF primitives.

title: Added Primitives
description: A sample scene showing cone, capsule, flat-ended capsule, and regular polyhedra primitives.

title: AnimatedSdfScene
description: Orbiting SDF primitives from AnimatedSdfScene2 with smooth blending.

title: SDF Experiment Template
description: Template scene for editing and testing custom SdfFunction WGSL.

title: SDF function test
description: Scene for testing SDF functions with a variety of primitives and operations.

title: texture test
description: Scene for testing texture sampling in SDFs

title: Showcase: Neon Garden
description: A repeated, twisted SDF garden using modifiers, smooth unions, PBR, and custom WGSL material bands.

title: Showcase: Crystal Reliquary
description: A polished CSG sculpture with subtractive cuts, nested primitives, and adjustable PBR surface response.

title: Showcase: Wave Temple
description: An animated SdfFunction water field framed by SDF architecture and metallic trim.

title: Showcase: Matcap Gallery
description: A moving-camera gallery scene using texture0Matcap, a custom faceted SDF, and dynamic lighting.

title: Showcase: Orbital Forge
description: A kinetic gyroid core with onion-shell modifier, animated satellites, rings, and PBR materials.

title: gyroid0
description: Scene copied from Showcase: Orbital Forge.
